---
title: "Index"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(factoextra)
library(scales)
```

```{r}
# Specialty df
df <- read.csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vR2Ouwi_7tjwsP87vmH477lwU1YmvVd7qcU53BE5ln1DNQZe9GRRLGAdQn5b90fqZ0Rw85EFXj1PCla/pub?gid=572838345&single=true&output=csv") 
colnames(df)[1]= "Category" 
# Laplace smoothing for S
alpha <- 0.5
K <- 10+1
total <- 195
df <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = - Category, 
    names_to = "language", 
    values_to = "count") %>%
  mutate(
    supply = (count + alpha)/(total + K*alpha),
    language = recode(language, 
      "Tagalog..incl..Filipino." = "Tagalog",
      "Haitian..Creole." = "Haitian"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#IMP
beadf <- read.csv("Cleaned BEU.csv")
imp <- beadf$prop
impt <- tibble(
  Category = c("Educational services", "Finance and insurance","Government","Health care and social assistance","Information","Other services, except government","Professional, scientific, and technical services","Real estate and rental and leasing","Transportation and warehousing","Utilities"),
  imp = imp
)
df <- df %>%
  left_join(impt, by = "Category")
```
```{r}
cor_imp_s <- df %>%
  select(supply, imp) %>% 
  drop_na() %>%
  cor()
print(cor_imp_s)
```

```{r} 
#LEP
pop <- read.csv("B16001.csv", skip = 1)
Spanish <- pop[[6]]/pop[[4]]
Chinese <- pop[[23]]/pop[[21]]
Tagalog <- pop[[27]]/pop[[25]]
Portuguese <- 100/640
Korean <- pop[[18]]/pop[[16]]
German <- pop[[12]]/pop[[10]]
Haitian <- pop[[9]]/pop[[7]]
Vietnamese <- pop[[24]]/pop[[22]]
French <- pop[[9]]/pop[[7]]
Hindi <- 145/843
Arabic <- pop[[6]]/pop[[4]]
Japanese <- 35/120
Russian <- pop[[15]]/pop[[13]]
lep <- c(Spanish, Chinese, Tagalog, Portuguese, Korean, German, Haitian, Vietnamese, French, Hindi, Arabic, Japanese, Russian)
lept <- tibble(
language = c("Spanish", "Chinese", "Tagalog", "Portuguese", "Korean", "German", "Haitian", "Vietnamese", "French", "Hindi", "Arabic", "Japanese", "Russian"),
  lep = lep
)
df <- df %>%
  left_join(lept, by = "language")
df
```
```{r}
cor_lep_s <- df %>%
  select(supply, lep) %>% 
  drop_na() %>%
  cor()
print(cor_lep_s)
```

```{r}
df9 <- read.csv("B16009.csv")
lagroup <- tibble(
  language = c("Spanish", "Chinese", "Tagalog", "Korean", "Vietnamese", "Japanese", "Portuguese", "German", "Haitian", "French", "Hindi", "Russian", "Arabic"),
  Group = c("Spanish", "Asian_Pacific", "Asian_Pacific", "Asian_Pacific", "Asian_Pacific", "Asian_Pacific", "Indo_Euro", "Indo_Euro", "Indo_Euro", "Indo_Euro", "Indo_Euro", "Indo_Euro", "Other")
)
# TEEN & POV
teen_povt <- as.data.frame(t(df9)) %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "Group") %>%
  as_tibble()%>%
  slice(-1) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("V"), as.numeric))
teen_pov <- lagroup %>%
  left_join(teen_povt, by = "Group") %>%
  rename(pov = V1, teen = V2) 
df <- df %>%
  left_join(teen_pov, by = "language")
```

```{r}
cor_teen_s <- df %>%
  select(supply, teen) %>% 
  drop_na() %>%
  cor()
print(cor_teen_s)
cor_pov_s <- df %>%
  select(supply, pov) %>% 
  drop_na() %>%
  cor()
print(cor_pov_s)
```

```{r}
pca <- df %>%
  select(supply, imp, lep, pov, teen) %>%
  drop_na()
pca <- prcomp(pca, scale. = TRUE)
fviz_eig(pca, addlables=TRUE, ylim = c(0, 100))
fviz_pca_var(pca, col.var = "contrib")
```

```{r}
pcad <- df %>%
  select(imp, lep, pov, teen) %>%
  drop_na()
pcad <- prcomp(pcad, scale. = TRUE)
fviz_eig(pcad, addlables=TRUE, ylim = c(0, 100))
fviz_pca_var(pcad, col.var = "contrib")
```
```{r}
pca$rotation
pcad$rotation
```
```{r}
v <- (pcad$sdev)^2
w <- v/sum(v)
coef <- pcad$rotation[, 1] *w[1] + pcad$rotation[, 2] * w[2]
coef
```
$$
\hat{S} = 0.250\times \text{IndustryImportance} + 0.321\times\text{LimitedEnglishProficiency} + 0.302\times\text{PovertyProportion} -0.236\times\text{UnderageProportion}
$$
```{r}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    demand = imp * coef[1] + lep * coef[2] + pov * coef[3] + teen * coef[4],
    supply = supply/mean(supply),
    demand = demand/mean(demand),
    rawi = supply/demand,
    i = rawi/mean(rawi)
  ) %>%
  select(Category, language, supply, demand, rawi, i) %>%
  arrange(desc(i))
df
```
